items.title: WATCH:  Romantic Valentine’s Day lights in Michigan
items.description: Dearborn Peace Park West is decorated with Valentine’s Day-themed lights and displays.

items.title: Partial shutdown hits DHS: What to know about negotiations, potential impacts
items.description: Lawmakers remain at an impasse over immigration enforcement, with Department of Homeland Security funding set to run out at the end of the day Friday.

items.title: WATCH:  Meet the family behind Clemmons Family Farm
items.description: As Black farmers have lost much of their land over the past century, one Vermont family is reclaiming its land for future generations.

items.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Law enforcement activity near Guthrie's home
items.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.
